001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.configuration;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.SeeSomethingAbqApplication;
004import org.springframework.boot.system.ApplicationHome;
005import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
006import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
007
008/**
009 * Spring configuration providing an {@link ApplicationHome} rooted at the server application
010 * class location.
011 */
012@Configuration
013public class ApplicationHomeConfiguration {
014
015  /**
016   * Provides an {@link ApplicationHome} instance for resolving paths relative to the running
017   * application.
018   *
019   * @return application home wrapper.
020   */
021  @Bean
022  public ApplicationHome provideApplicationHome() {
023    return new ApplicationHome(SeeSomethingAbqApplication.class);
024  }
025
026}
